About Me

I am a passionate DevOps Engineer with experience in CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation, cloud platforms, and containerization. I enjoy building scalable and reliable systems.

Audio to Text Translator

Built cloud-based application using AWS services to convert audio/video files into text with multi-language support.
